events.shortDescription:
First come, first served with fair rotations — our KJs keep things moving and make you sound your best. Drop your song off by the stage and jump into the rotation.

🎶 Songbook: songs.overlandbar.com
💸 Show your KJ some love!
events.highlightHook: Big songs, good people, and a mic waiting for you.
events.weeknightHook: I wanna sing… but I don’t wanna wait 2 hours.
events.weeknightCallToAction: Come get your songs in before the weekend rush
events.weekendHook: Big crowd, big energy, full bar
events.weekendCallToAction: Want more than one song? Come early
events.signupNote: Sign up with the KJ by the stage.

events.shortDescription: Happy hour from open to early evening — ease into the night with cold drinks, good company, and a smooth lead-in to karaoke.
events.highlightHook: Six hours of happy hour — no rush, just show up.
events.specialsDeals: $1 off every beer; $1 off well drinks
events.callToAction: Come in early or settle in for the night.
